title: rhododendron lateriflorum
intro: Rhododendron lateriflorum, also known as the wild azalea or mountain azalea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron lateriflorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Rhododendron lateriflorum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote digestion and relieve menstrual cramps.
